name: PAX FLOW Charging Dock
summary: PAX FLOW Charging Dock — a battery accessory for keeping your device powered.
description: Offer your customers the perfect blend of style and function with the PAX Flow Charging Dock – the official desktop charger for the PAX Flow Vaporiser. Designed for fast, efficient USB-C charging, this premium dock keeps the device ready for use while doubling as an elegant display piece. Genuine PAX Labs accessory – sourced directly from the manufacturer for authenticity and compatibility. Keeps your device charged and ready.
